claim: A cash economy built on smallholder value addition.
facts: Coffee moved from raw export toward processed, value-added trade

claim: From sixty megawatts to a national grid.
facts: Paved road network: ~1,000 km → 6,850 km of a 21,000 km national network

claim: Health services extended into every district.
facts: Neonatal and maternal care extended into rural clinics
National immunisation and primary healthcare coverage expanded

claim: A generation that stayed in school.
facts: Universal Primary Education enrolling millions since 1997
Vocational and university enrolment expanding nationwide

claim: Growth shared beyond the capital, and beyond the border.
facts: Kampala–Entebbe Expressway: 51 km, cutting a 90-minute journey to about 40
Source of the Nile Bridge, Jinja: 525 m, commissioned 2018
1.8 million refugees hosted under the Refugee Act, 2006
Peaceful transitions of local and national administration
A foundation for long-term national planning
